# forge

> Model-agnostic, self-learning, self-healing agent harness — a Python SDK
> that decouples the agent chassis from the model and the use case. Same
> kernel runs SDR, COO, and code-agent verticals; swap the model by
> changing one YAML profile.

forge implements an 8-layer harness with strict layer ordering, a hook bus
as the only cross-cutting seam, full-fidelity trace persistence, eval-gated
skill autosynthesis, topology × consensus swarm primitives, and a recursive
self-modification loop honoring the AutoAgent regularizer ("would this
still help if this specific task vanished?").

PyPI: `pip install forge-harness`
Import: `import forge`
GitHub: https://github.com/jbellsolutions/forge
Version: 0.1.1

## Docs

- [README](README.md): full product narrative + research story + live verification table
- [ARCHITECTURE](ARCHITECTURE.md): 8-layer map, hook bus, recursion seam, filesystem contract
- [ETHOS](ETHOS.md): design philosophy, non-goals, what gets a PR rejected vs. landed
- [AGENTS](AGENTS.md): reference verticals (operator, operator_real, recursion_demo) and role injection
- [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md): dev setup, layer rules, release process
- [SECURITY](SECURITY.md): vulnerability disclosure
- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md): version history starting at 0.1.0

## Public API surface (re-exported from `forge/__init__.py`)

- L0 kernel: `AgentDef`, `AgentLoop`, `AssistantTurn`, `HookBus`, `HookContext`, `LoopResult`, `Message`, `PermissionMode`, `ProviderProfile`, `ToolCall`, `ToolResult`, `Verdict`, `load_profile`
- L1 memory: `ClaudeDir`, `GitJournal`, `Memory`, `Note`, `ObsidianVault`, `PromotionResult`, `ReasoningBank`, `genome`, `genome_path`, `promote`
- L2 tools: `Tool`, `ToolRegistry`
- L3 healing: `CircuitBreaker`, `CircuitRegistry`, `CircuitState`, `ErrorType`, `attach_healing`, `classify`
- L4 swarm: `Consensus`, `RoleAssignment`, `RoleCouncilSpawner`, `Spawner`, `SwarmResult`, `SwarmSpec`, `Topology`
- L5 skills: `CONFIDENCE_MARGIN`, `EvalReport`, `MIN_SAMPLES`, `SkillRun`, `SkillSearchIndex`, `SkillStore`, `autosynth`, `evaluate`, `promote_if_passing`
- L7 observability: `SessionStat`, `Telemetry`, `TraceStore`
- Providers: `Provider`, `make_provider`
- Recursion: `HarnessDiff`, `RecurseResult`, `ResultsLedger`, `TraceAnalyzer`, `propose`, `propose_with_llm`, `recurse_once`

## CLI

```
forge doctor             # environment audit
forge run                # run a vertical
forge recurse            # one self-mod cycle
forge recurse-loop       # continuous self-mod
forge dashboard          # read-only telemetry view
forge skill {list,search,promote,autosynth}
forge vault {note,backlinks,graph}
forge heartbeat          # scheduler entry point
forge mcp                # start forge-as-MCP server (12 tools)
```

## MCP server

forge exposes 12 tools when run as an MCP server: `forge_council`,
`forge_recurse`, `forge_vault_note`, `forge_vault_backlinks`,
`forge_vault_graph`, `forge_memory_remember`, `forge_memory_recall`,
`forge_memory_promote`, `forge_skill_search`, `forge_skill_run`,
`forge_doctor`, `forge_dashboard`.

## Claude Code integration

Slash command `/forge` and skill `forge` ship in
`~/.claude/commands/forge.md` and `~/.claude/skills/forge/SKILL.md`.
